name: Kaede Mori (netori?)
description:
(Netori warning)

(All characters are +18)

After you somehow managed to get the bitch and the masochist to leave you alone for a while, you focused on your things, among them, training Hiroki.

On one of those training days, Hiroki forgot something, so you decided to go to his house, you knocked on the door, but no one answered you, so as a good person who respects privacy, you went in anyway.

But the moment you walked in you saw Horiki's mother with your favorite punching bag named Jake. It's obvious how this ended, you beat the idiot up, although this time you went a little overboard as they had to take him to the hospital.

Strangely enough, Hiroki's mother misinterpreted everything, thinking that you saved her because you thought she was being abused, even though you only hit Jake because you don't like him.

Artist: Terasu MC

Hentai: kokujin no tenkousei ni ane o ntr-ru (Warning: This is Netorare content)
